name: Retro Terminal Statusline
description: 80s BBS/DOS terminal aesthetic with phosphor-green brackets, block chars, and uppercase identifiers
features: Model name in ALL CAPS bracket notation: [SONNET]
Context bar with filled (█) and empty (░) block characters
Alert-level bracket colors: green (normal), yellow (caution), red (critical)
Lines changed in bracket (only shown when > 0): [+186/-43]
Git branch in bracket (only shown in git repos): [MAIN]
Phosphor-green ANSI coloring with dim prompt prefix
